articles.title_en: Commander Nuriakhmetov: The Russian Armed Forces destroyed more than 40 saboteurs of the Armed Forces of Ukraine near Grishin
articles.lead_en: The commander of the assault platoon of the 35th brigade of troops "Center" reported that the enemy was moving in small groups on foot

articles.title_en: Commander Golubets: Before the assault on Grishin, the Russian Armed Forces completely shackled the logistics of the Armed Forces of Ukraine
articles.lead_en: At the time Russian attack aircraft entered the populated area, the enemy was already very exhausted, the serviceman emphasized

articles.title_en: Commander Nuriakhmetov: The Ukrainian Armed Forces from Grishin sent saboteurs to Krasnoarmeysk
articles.lead_en: The Russian Armed Forces have been destroying all enemy sabotage groups for some time, the military man said

articles.title_en: Group "North": Russian paratroopers destroy Ukrainian Armed Forces soldiers by luring them into traps
articles.lead_en: Enemy military personnel along the route in the Sumy region are eliminated in pre-targeted areas
articles.title_raw: Группировка "Север": десантники РФ уничтожают солдат ВСУ, заманивая в ловушки

articles.lead_en: Russia does not see political will on the part of the Kyiv regime to resolve the conflict, Russian Presidential Press Secretary Dmitry Peskov indicated in a commentary to Vesti.
articles.lead_raw: Россия не видит со стороны киевского режима политической воли к урегулированию конфликта, указал в комментарии "Вестям" пресс-секретарь президента РФ Дмитрий Песков

articles.title_en: Sweden Releases Russian Captain After ‘Shadow Fleet’ Ship Detention
articles.lead_en: Swedish prosecutors said they could not disprove the captain’s claim that he was unaware the ship’s registration papers were fraudulent.

articles.title_en: Patriot Park Deputy Director Arrested for Allegedly Accepting Bribe
articles.lead_en: Vitaly Melimuk is the latest park official to face criminal prosecution amid a wider shakeup in Russia’s military establishment.
articles.title_raw: Patriot Park Deputy Director Arrested for Allegedly Accepting Bribe
articles.lead_raw: Vitaly Melimuk is the latest park official to face criminal prosecution amid a wider shakeup in Russia’s military establishment.

articles.title_en: Deputy director of Russia’s Defense Ministry ‘Patriot’ park arrested on bribery charges
articles.lead_en: A court has sanctioned the arrest of Vitaly Melimuk, deputy general director of the Defense Ministry’s Patriot park, on charges of accepting an 18-million-ruble bribe, the Russian Investigative Committee’s press service announced. Melimuk serves as the park’s deputy general director for operations and logistics.
articles.title_raw: Deputy director of Russia’s Defense Ministry ‘Patriot’ park arrested on bribery charges
articles.lead_raw: A court has sanctioned the arrest of Vitaly Melimuk, deputy general director of the Defense Ministry’s Patriot park, on charges of accepting an 18-million-ruble bribe, the Russian Investigative Committee’s press service announced. Melimuk serves as the park’s deputy general director for operations and logistics.

articles.title_en: Teenager in Russia injured after picking up explosive device disguised as bundle of banknotes
articles.lead_en: A teenager in Perm sustained burns after picking up a device disguised as a bundle of banknotes that detonated when he lifted it off the ground, Perm Krai’s Territorial Security Ministry announced, according to the Russian news agency Interfax on April 21.
articles.title_raw: Teenager in Russia injured after picking up explosive device disguised as bundle of banknotes

articles.title_en: Zelensky says Ukraine has completed repairs on Druzhba pipeline, which carries Russian oil to Europe
articles.lead_en: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky said on April 21 that specialists had completed repairs on a section of the Druzhba pipeline that Kyiv says was damaged in a Russian military strike.

articles.title_en: Russia Says Freed 2 Hostages Taken by Jihadists in Niger
articles.lead_en: The two employees of Russian geology company were freed by a "special operation" carried out by Russia's Africa Corps in Mali, the Defense Ministry said.

articles.title_en: Russia Removes 2 Decades of Court Statistics From Public Access
articles.lead_en: The court statistics had been used to analyze trends in cases such as treason, the dissemination of “fake news” about the army, “discrediting” the military, sabotage and the justification of terrorism.

articles.title_en: Russian Businesses Helping Funnel Military Equipment to Wagner Successor Group in Mali – Report

articles.title_en: Dozens of Israelis Briefly Detained, Questioned at Moscow Airport
articles.lead_en: Russian media reported that security officials questioned some of the Israeli passengers over the U.S.-Israeli war against Iran.
